name: On-Time Delivery Rate
description: Percentage of deliveries completed on or before the scheduled date.

name: Production Yield
description: Ratio of good units produced to total units started.

name: Cycle Time
description: Average time to complete one production cycle from start to finish.

name: Schedule Adherence
description: Percentage of production activities completed as per the planned schedule.

name: Cost Per Unit
description: Total production cost divided by the number of units produced.

name: Inventory Turnover
description: Number of times inventory is sold and replaced over a period.

name: Right First Time (RFT)
description: Percentage of products manufactured correctly without rework.

name: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness)
description: Combined measure of availability, performance, and quality of equipment.

name: Customer Complaint Rate
description: Number of customer complaints per number of units shipped.

name: Batch Success Rate
description: Percentage of production batches that pass quality checks on first attempt.
